seo.title: OmniFlow · Modular AI Business Management for SMEs | Warehouse Intelligence
seo.description: OmniFlow: AI management software for SMEs with WMS, sales, purchasing, orders and finance in one system. 8 modules, built-in AI, cloud or on-premise. GDPR. Book a demo.
seo.keywords: AI business management software, AI ERP for SMEs, AI warehouse management software, cloud WMS, modular ERP SME, OmniFlow Finch-AI, warehouse intelligence, closed-loop commerce software, Smart Quote Builder, AI guided picking, dynamic slotting, AI stockout prediction software, Smart Swap, Golden Thread ERP
seo.ogImageAlt: OmniFlow — Dashboard of Finch-AI's Warehouse Intelligence AI management system
seo.ldDescription: OmniFlow is the modular AI management system for SMEs: it closes the Buy → Stock → Sell → Deliver → Collect loop in a single system, with 8 integrated modules and AI active across the whole pipeline. Multi-warehouse, cloud or on-premise, GDPR compliant.

hero.title: The management system with built-in AI that evolves with your business.
hero.lead: OmniFlow closes the Buy → Stock → Sell → Deliver → Collect loop in a single system. One data point, one truth — for every department, in real time.

problemHead.title: When data doesn't flow, margin gets lost
problemHead.lead: Purchasing, warehouse, sales and finance often use separate tools. The result is manual work, decisions in the dark and eroded margins.

problems.title: Departments that don't talk
problems.desc: Excel, email and separate systems: each function works on different numbers, often out of sync with each other.

problems.title: Decisions without the full picture
problems.desc: Stockouts, overstock, imprecise quotes: without up-to-date data you decide by gut, and the margin suffers.

problems.title: Too much manual work
problems.desc: Retyping between systems and alignment emails: repetitive operations steal time and introduce errors.

solutionHead.title: One single flow, from supplier to customer
solutionHead.lead: OmniFlow connects every stage with AI always on: it forecasts, suggests and automates across the whole pipeline.

flowSteps.p: Smart Restock forecasts stockouts and proposes orders ready to approve.
Bin map, guided picking and AI-optimized dynamic slotting.
Quote builder with live margin and Smart Swap proposing better alternatives.
Order kanban, carrier planning and tracking of shipping documents.
Automatic invoicing from orders and a cash-flow timeline.

highlights.title: Follow the thread, from supplier to customer
highlights.desc: One click reveals the whole chain: PO → bin → order → invoice. Zero manual searching.

highlights.title: One keyboard, the whole system
highlights.desc: Global shortcut: find and do anything in OmniFlow in an instant.

highlights.title: Sell better, not just more
highlights.desc: The AI proposes higher-margin alternatives as you build the quote.

highlights.title: The supplier market, in the clear
highlights.desc: Price history for every item and an alert if you're paying more than usual.

modulesHead.title: The whole commerce cycle, in one system
modulesHead.lead: Modular by design: turn on only what you need today and add more as you grow.

modules.title: Purchasing & Suppliers
modules.desc: Scorecards, automatic RFQs, price history, goods receiving.

modules.title: WMS Warehouse
modules.desc: Bin map, guided picking, slotting, multi-warehouse.

modules.title: Sales & Quotes
modules.desc: Quote builder, live margin, Good/Better/Best, digital signature.

modules.title: OMS Orders
modules.desc: Kanban, back-orders, Golden Thread, approval workflows.

modules.title: Shipping
modules.desc: Carrier planning, tracking, delivery notes, direct dropshipping.

modules.title: Finance
modules.desc: Automatic invoices from orders, cash flow, Stripe integration.

modules.title: Returns & Quality
modules.desc: Customer and supplier returns, quality inspections, scorecards.

modules.title: Reports & Analytics
modules.desc: Role-based dashboards, live KPIs, data export, scheduler.

assistant.title: An extra teammate, always available
assistant.text: It knows your whole company, answers in natural language and acts under your supervision — on every screen, for every role.
assistant.feat1Desc: Late orders, top customers, low stock: instant answers.
assistant.feat2Desc: Quotes, orders, RFQs — always with confirmation before writing.
assistant.feat3Desc: Higher-margin alternatives, better suppliers, optimal slotting.
assistant.feat4Desc: Every write requires your explicit confirmation.
assistant.chatQ1: Which orders are late this week?
assistant.chatA1Post: : Fratelli Esposito, Centro Edile Brianza and Hotel Mediterraneo. Shall I prepare a message for the customers?
assistant.chatQ2: Top products by margin this month
assistant.chatA2Pre: Leading are Roman Travertine, Interlocking Paver and Oak Parquet. With
assistant.chatA2Post: I can propose higher-margin alternatives on the open quotes.

rolesHead.title: The right advantage for every role

roles.title: Management
roles.desc: Real-time KPIs and end-to-end visibility. Margins and turnover always under control, with no manual reconciliations.

roles.title: Sales
roles.desc: A quote in moments, margin visible as you negotiate, a digital signature that becomes an order. Zero retyping.

roles.title: Purchasing
roles.desc: Forecast stockouts and orders ready to approve. Suppliers evaluated with objective data and price history always visible.

roles.title: Warehouse
roles.desc: Guided picking with optimized routes and a bin map. Every bin linked to the order, errors reduced.

roles.title: Operations
roles.desc: Visual workflows, fast approvals, clear escalations. The AI flags exceptions before they become problems.

roles.title: Finance
roles.desc: A cash-flow timeline between expected income and outgoing commitments. Automatic invoicing and reconciliation.

faqs.q: Does OmniFlow replace my current management system?
faqs.a: OmniFlow is a complete operating system for the Buy → Stock → Sell cycle. If you use SAP or Oracle for general accounting, OmniFlow runs alongside and integrates via API — it doesn't replace them.
Available in the cloud (EU data centers) and on-premise. Data isolated per tenant, encrypted at rest and in transit. GDPR compliance included.

faqs.q: Do I have to enable all the modules?
faqs.a: No. OmniFlow is modular by design: enable only the modules you need today and add others at any time, with no data migrations.

faqs.q: Is my data used to train AI models?
faqs.a: No. The AI uses your data exclusively to answer your requests. Write operations always require your explicit confirmation.

related.title: Complete your AI stack
related.card1Title: Extract data from invoices, delivery notes and receipts
related.card1Text: Ready-to-use AI for business documents, with an Android app for field operators and direct integration with OmniFlow.
related.card2Title: Financial statement and ratio analysis with AI
related.card2Text: Upload your Excel financials and get a professional report, financial ratios and an AI chat on your numbers.

cta.text: A personalized demo for your industry. No commitment, just concrete answers.
